title: meehania radicans
intro: Meehania radicans, also known as creeping Meehania or creeping Meehania, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Meehania radicans has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Meehania radicans is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, including capsules and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
